source.title: Rose corn-oil trial: corn oil versus control after myocardial infarction
source.position: NEW:Replacing saturated fat with polyunsaturated fat does not reduce CVD risk

provenance.quote: Eighty men with a history of myocardial infarction were allocated at random to a corn-oil, olive-oil, or control group.

position.quote: At the end of two years the corn-oil group had fared no better, and possibly worse, than the controls.

factorWeights.factor: Weight given to hard clinical outcomes over biomarkers
factorWeights.quote: We assessed reinfarction and death rather than serum cholesterol alone.
factorWeights.rationale: The trial reports hard cardiovascular endpoints, the dimension the camps weigh differently.
